query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ai_summary IS NOT NULL AND ai_summary != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_summary,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ai_summary IS NULL OR ai_summary = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as needs_summary,
  SUM(CASE WHEN usp IS NOT NULL AND usp != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_usp,
  SUM(CASE WHEN price_tier IS NOT NULL AND price_tier != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_price_tier,
  SUM(CASE WHEN not_suitable_for IS NOT NULL AND not_suitable_for != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_not_suitable,
  SUM(CASE WHEN website IS NOT NULL AND website != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_website,
  SUM(CASE WHEN description IS NOT NULL AND description != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_description
FROM suppliers;
